allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(list\(d[0].keys\(\)\) if d else 'empty'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in d.get\('dependencies',{}\).items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d.get\(k\) for k in ['id','protectionBypass','passwordProtection','ssoProtection','public']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(data[0]['id'] if data else 'none'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(list\(d[0].keys\(\)\) if d else 'empty table'\)")
Bash(xargs sed -i '' "s/await fetch\('\\/api\\//await apiFetch\('\\/api\\//g; s/ fetch\('\\/api\\// apiFetch\('\\/api\\//g")
Bash(python3 -c "from PIL import Image; print\('pillow ok'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('token found' if d.get\('token'\) else 'no token'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:', d.get\('main'\)\); print\('module:', d.get\('module'\)\); print\('types:', d.get\('types'\)\)")

Bash(sed -i '' 's/'\\''max\(\\.875rem, env\(safe-area-inset-top\)\)'\\''/'\\''calc\(.875rem + env\(safe-area-inset-top, 0px\)\)'\\''/g' src/components/patient/WaitingRoom.jsx src/components/patient/AITriage.jsx src/components/patient/ConsentGate.jsx src/pages/clinician/AdminSchedule.jsx src/pages/clinician/AdminPayroll.jsx src/pages/clinician/ProviderSchedule.jsx)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ID:', d[0]['id'] if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('id','ERROR'\), '\\nFull:', json.dumps\(d, indent=2\)[:400]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[0]; [print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\) for k,v in d.items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d.get\('ok'\)\); print\('error:', d.get\('error','none'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cs=d.get\('clientSecret',''\); print\('clientSecret:', cs[:30]+'...' if cs else d\)")
